candidates.why: Explicit total top-line revenue row; identical to Net sales in preview and suitable as reported revenue line.
Direct sales/revenue row at top of income statement; semantically strong top-line revenue label.
Balancing row, not an actual reported revenue line.
Explicitly non-revenue, so not suitable for REVT.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for the reported revenue line. 'Net sales' is the most semantically precise top-line; 'Total Revenue' is a valid fallback if labels vary by year.

candidates.why: Primary direct operating cost bucket below revenue; appears to aggregate purchases/inventory change/external services and best matches cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Purchases of materials, supplies and goods
candidates.why: Direct input cost component, but narrower than full cost of sales and excludes service-related direct costs.
Balancing row, not an actual reported expense line.

variables.notes: Selected the broader direct cost bucket rather than a partial component.

candidates.why: Candidate overhead component, but it sits inside 'Materials and services' which is selected as COGS, so including it here would misclassify/directly overlap with COGS.
Operating overhead/personnel cost bucket above EBIT and outside D&A/finance/tax lines.
Overhead-like compensation item, but it appears to be a subcomponent of Employee benefit expenses, so selecting both would likely double count.
Operating overhead bucket above EBIT; excludes D&A and finance items.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Chose the best overhead buckets and excluded 'External services' because it is embedded in COGS via 'Materials and services'. Excluded 'Share-based payments' to avoid double counting within 'Employee benefit expenses'.
No dedicated research and development line is visible above or below EBIT in the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Broadest single finance-cost line and best fallback when no single total interest-expense line is separately reported.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on loans recognised at amortised cost
candidates.why: Most specific core interest expense line, but excludes lease interest and therefore is incomplete as total interest expense.
Specific interest component, but only part of total interest expense.
Finance expense line but not specifically interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on finance lease agreement
candidates.why: Interest-related label, but no visible populated values in preview and likely narrow component only.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Hybrid Debt Instruments - Equity
candidates.why: Special instrument-related item, not the recurring operating financing line to prefer.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure and component only, not preferred over reported statement line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on loans recognised at amortised cost

variables.notes: Using a priority list. 'Financial expenses' is the best single reported line covering financing cost; 'Interest expenses on loans recognised at amortised cost' is a fallback if the broader line is unavailable.

candidates.why: Income statement item, not book equity.
Equity component only, not total owner equity.
Total equity line, but less preferred because owner-attributable equity is separately available.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company
